v.CNV: 以下是亚当后代的记录。　神创造人的时候，是按着自己的样式造的；
v.ESV: This is the book of the generations of Adam. When God created man, he made him in the likeness of God.
v.GAE: 이것은 아담의 계보를 적은 책이니라 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에 하나님의 모양대로 지으시되
v.KJV: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made he him;
v.KLB: 이것은 아담 자손들의 족보이다. 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에 자기 모습 을 닮은
v.KRV: 아담 자손의 계보가 이러하니라 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에 하나님의 형상대로 지으시되
v.NASB: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day when God created man, He made him in the likeness of God.
v.NIV: This is the written account of Adam’s family line. When God created mankind, he made them in the likeness of God.
v.NRSV: This is the list of the descendants of Adam. When God created humankind, he made them in the likeness of God.
v.SAENEW: 아담의 역사는 이러하다. 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에, 하나님의 형상대로 사람을 만드셨다.
v.WLB: 아담의 역사에 대한 기록은 이렇습니다. 하나님께서 사람을 창조하실 때 하나님의 형상을 따라 만드셨습니다.

v.CNV: 他创造了一男一女。在创造他们的时候，　神赐福给他们，称他们为人。
v.ESV: Male and female he created them, and he blessed them and named them Man when they were created.
v.GAE: 남자와 여자를 창조하셨고 그들이 창조되던 날에 하나님이 그들에게 복을 주시고 그들의 이름을 사람이라 일컬으셨더라
v.KJV: Male and female created he them; and blessed them, and called their name Adam, in the day when they were created.
v.KLB: 남자와 여자를 창조하여 그들을 축복하시고 그들의 이름을 ‘사람’ 이라고 부르셨다.
v.KRV: 남자와 여자를 창조하셨고 그들이 창조되던 날에 하나님이 그들에게 복을 주시고 그들의 이름을 사람이라 일컬으셨더라
v.NASB: He created them male and female, and He blessed them and named them Man in the day when they were created.
v.NIV: He created them male and female and blessed them. And he named them “Mankind” when they were created.
v.NRSV: Male and female he created them, and he blessed them and named them “Humankind” when they were created.
v.SAENEW: 하나님은 그들을 남자와 여자로 창조하셨다. 그들을 창조하시던 날에, 하나님은 그들에게 복을 주시고, 그들의 이름을 '사람'이라고 하셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 그들을 남자와 여자로 만드셨습니다. 그들이 창조되던 날에 하나님께서 그들에게 복을 주시고 그들의 이름을 ‘사람’이라 부르셨습니다.

v.CNV: 亚当一百三十岁的时候，生了一个儿子，样式和形象都和自己相似，就给他起名叫塞特。
v.ESV: When Adam had lived 130 years, he fathered a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.
v.GAE: 아담은 백삼십 세에 자기의 모양 곧 자기의 형상과 같은 아들을 낳아 이름을 셋이라 하였고
v.KJV: And Adam lived an hundred and thirty years, and begat a son in his own likeness, after his image; and called his name Seth:
v.KLB: 아담은 130세에 자기를 닮은 아들을 낳아 그 이름을 셋이라고 지었다.
v.KRV: 아담이 일백 삼십세에 자기 모양 곧 자기 형상과 같은 아들을 낳아 이름을 셋이라 하였고
v.NASB: When Adam had lived one hundred and thirty years, he became the father of a son in his own likeness, according to his image, and named him Seth.
v.NIV: When Adam had lived 130 years, he had a son in his own likeness, in his own image; and he named him Seth.
v.NRSV: When Adam had lived one hundred thirty years, he became the father of a son in his likeness, according to his image, and named him Seth.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 백서른 살에 자기의 형상 곧 자기의 모습을 닮은 아이를 낳고, 이름을 셋이라고 하였다.
v.WLB: 아담이 130세에 자기의 모양을 따라 자기의 형상대로 아들을 낳고 그 이름을 셋이라고 불렀습니다.

v.CNV: 亚当生塞特以后，还活了八百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: The days of Adam after he fathered Seth were 800 years; and he had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 아담은 셋을 낳은 후 팔백 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And the days of Adam after he had begotten Seth were eight hundred years: and he begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 그는 800년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 아담이 셋을 낳은 후 팔백년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then the days of Adam after he became the father of Seth were eight hundred years, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After Seth was born, Adam lived 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: The days of Adam after he became the father of Seth were eight hundred years; and he had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 셋을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 셋을 낳은 후 아담은 800년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 亚当共活了九百三十岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days that Adam lived were 930 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years: and he died.
v.KLB: 930세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 구백 삼십세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Adam lived a total of 930 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred thirty years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 모두 구백삼십 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 塞特一百零五岁的时候，生了以挪士。
v.ESV: When Seth had lived 105 years, he fathered Enosh.
v.KJV: And Seth lived an hundred and five years, and begat Enos:
v.KLB: 셋은 105세에 에노스를 낳았고
v.KRV: 셋은 일백 오세에 에노스를 낳았고
v.NASB: Seth lived one hundred and five years, and became the father of Enosh.
v.NIV: When Seth had lived 105 years, he became the father of Enosh.
v.NRSV: When Seth had lived one hundred five years, he became the father of Enosh.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 백다섯 살에 에노스를 낳았다.

v.CNV: 塞特生以挪士以后，还活了八百零七年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Seth lived after he fathered Enosh 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 에노스를 낳은 후 팔백칠 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Seth lived after he begat Enos eight hundred and seven years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 807년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 에노스를 낳은 후 팔백 칠년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Seth lived eight hundred and seven years after he became the father of Enosh, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Enosh, Seth lived 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Seth lived after the birth of Enosh eight hundred seven years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 에노스를 낳은 뒤에, 팔백칠 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 에노스를 낳은 후 807년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 塞特共活了九百一十二岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Seth were 912 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years: and he died.
v.KLB: 912세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 구백 십 이세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Seth lived a total of 912 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Seth were nine hundred twelve years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 모두 구백십이 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 以挪士九十岁的时候，生了该南。
v.ESV: When Enosh had lived 90 years, he fathered Kenan.
v.KJV: And Enos lived ninety years, and begat Cainan:
v.KLB: 에노스는 90세에 게난을 낳았고
v.KRV: 에노스는 구십세에 게난을 낳았고
v.NASB: Enosh lived ninety years, and became the father of Kenan.
v.NIV: When Enosh had lived 90 years, he became the father of Kenan.
v.NRSV: When Enosh had lived ninety years, he became the father of Kenan.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 아흔 살에 게난을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 以挪士生该南以后，还活了八百一十五年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Enosh lived after he fathered Kenan 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 게난을 낳은 후 팔백십오 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Enos lived after he begat Cainan eight hundred and fifteen years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 815년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 게난을 낳은 후 팔백 십 오년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Enosh lived eight hundred and fifteen years after he became the father of Kenan, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Kenan, Enosh lived 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Enosh lived after the birth of Kenan eight hundred fifteen years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 게난을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백십오 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 게난을 낳은 후 815년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 以挪士共活了九百零五岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Enosh were 905 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
v.KLB: 905세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 구백 오세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Enosh were nine hundred and five years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Enosh lived a total of 905 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Enosh were nine hundred five years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 모두 구백오 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 该南七十岁的时候，生了玛勒列。
v.ESV: When Kenan had lived 70 years, he fathered Mahalalel.
v.KJV: And Cainan lived seventy years, and begat Mahalaleel:
v.KLB: 게난은 70세에 마할랄렐을 낳았고
v.KRV: 게난은 칠십세에 마할랄렐을 낳았고
v.NASB: Kenan lived seventy years, and became the father of Mahalalel.
v.NIV: When Kenan had lived 70 years, he became the father of Mahalalel.
v.NRSV: When Kenan had lived seventy years, he became the father of Mahalalel.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 일흔 살에 마할랄렐을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 该南生玛勒列以后，还活了八百四十年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Kenan lived after he fathered Mahalalel 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 마할랄렐을 낳은 후 팔백사십 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel eight hundred and forty years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 840년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 마할랄렐을 낳은 후 팔백 사십년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Kenan lived eight hundred and forty years after he became the father of Mahalalel, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Mahalalel, Kenan lived 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Kenan lived after the birth of Mahalalel eight hundred and forty years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 마할랄렐을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백사십 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 마할랄렐을 낳은 후 840년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 该南共活了九百一十岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Kenan were 910 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Cainan were nine hundred and ten years: and he died.
v.KLB: 910세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 구백 십세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Kenan were nine hundred and ten years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Kenan lived a total of 910 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Kenan were nine hundred and ten years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 모두 구백십 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 玛勒列六十五岁的时候，生了雅列。
v.ESV: When Mahalalel had lived 65 years, he fathered Jared.
v.KJV: And Mahalaleel lived sixty and five years, and begat Jared:
v.KLB: 마할랄렐은 65세에 야렛을 낳았고
v.KRV: 마할랄렐은 육십 오세에 야렛을 낳았고
v.NASB: Mahalalel lived sixty-five years, and became the father of Jared.
v.NIV: When Mahalalel had lived 65 years, he became the father of Jared.
v.NRSV: When Mahalalel had lived sixty-five years, he became the father of Jared.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 예순다섯 살에 야렛을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 玛勒列生雅列以后，还活了八百三十年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Mahalalel lived after he fathered Jared 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 야렛을 낳은 후 팔백삼십 년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Mahalaleel lived after he begat Jared eight hundred and thirty years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 830년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 야렛을 낳은 후 팔백 삼십년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Mahalalel lived eight hundred and thirty years after he became the father of Jared, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Jared, Mahalalel lived 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Mahalalel lived after the birth of Jared eight hundred thirty years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 야렛을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백삼십 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 야렛을 낳은 후 830년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 玛勒列共活了八百九十五岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Mahalalel were 895 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Mahalaleel were eight hundred ninety and five years: and he died.
v.KLB: 895세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 팔백 구십 오세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred and ninety-five years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Mahalalel lived a total of 895 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred ninety-five years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 모두 팔백구십오 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 雅列一百六十二岁的时候，生了以诺。
v.ESV: When Jared had lived 162 years, he fathered Enoch.
v.KJV: And Jared lived an hundred sixty and two years, and he begat Enoch:
v.KLB: 야렛은 162세에 에녹을 낳았고
v.KRV: 야렛은 일백 육십 이세에 에녹을 낳았고
v.NASB: Jared lived one hundred and sixty-two years, and became the father of Enoch.
v.NIV: When Jared had lived 162 years, he became the father of Enoch.
v.NRSV: When Jared had lived one hundred sixty-two years he became the father of Enoch.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 백예순두 살에 에녹을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 雅列生以诺以后，还活了八百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Jared lived after he fathered Enoch 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 에녹을 낳은 후 팔백 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 800년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 에녹을 낳은 후 팔백년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Jared lived eight hundred years after he became the father of Enoch, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Enoch, Jared lived 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Jared lived after the birth of Enoch eight hundred years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 에녹을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 에녹을 낳은 후 800년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 雅列共活了九百六十二岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Jared were 962 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years: and he died.
v.KLB: 962세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그가 구백 육십 이세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Jared were nine hundred and sixty-two years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Jared lived a total of 962 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty-two years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 모두 구백육십이 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 以诺六十五岁的时候，生了玛土撒拉。
v.ESV: When Enoch had lived 65 years, he fathered Methuselah.
v.KJV: And Enoch lived sixty and five years, and begat Methuselah:
v.KLB: 에녹은 65세에 므두셀라를 낳았고
v.KRV: 에녹은 육십 오세에 므두셀라를 낳았고
v.NASB: Enoch lived sixty-five years, and became the father of Methuselah.
v.NIV: When Enoch had lived 65 years, he became the father of Methuselah.
v.NRSV: When Enoch had lived sixty-five years, he became the father of Methuselah.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 예순다섯 살에 므두셀라를 낳았다.

v.CNV: 以诺生玛土撒拉以后，和　神同行三百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Enoch walked with God after he fathered Methuselah 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 므두셀라를 낳은 후 삼백 년을 하나님과 동행하며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Enoch walked with God after he begat Methuselah three hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 300년 동안 하나님과 깊은 교제를 나누며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가 365세까지 살았다.
v.KRV: 므두셀라를 낳은 후 삼백년을 하나님과 동행하며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Enoch walked with God three hundred years after he became the father of Methuselah, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Methuselah, Enoch walked faithfully with God 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Enoch walked with God after the birth of Methuselah three hundred years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 므두셀라를 낳은 뒤에, 삼백 년 동안 하나님과 동행하면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 므두셀라를 낳은 후 300년 동안 하나님과 동행하며 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 以诺共活了三百六十五岁。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Enoch were 365 years.
v.KJV: And all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 300년 동안 하나님과 깊은 교제를 나누며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가 365세까지 살았다.
v.KRV: 그가 삼백 육십 오세를 향수하였더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Enoch were three hundred and sixty-five years.
v.NIV: Altogether, Enoch lived a total of 365 years.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty-five years.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 모두 삼백육십오 년을 살았다.

v.CNV: 以诺和　神同行，所以　神把他取去，他就不在了。
v.ESV: Enoch walked with God, and he was not, for God took him.
v.GAE: 에녹이 하나님과 동행하더니 하나님이 그를 데려가시므로 세상에 있지 아니하였더라
v.KJV: And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.
v.KLB: 그가 하나님과 깊은 교제를 나누며 사는 중에 하나님이 그를 데려가시므로 그가 사라지고 말았다.
v.KRV: 에녹이 하나님과 동행하더니 하나님이 그를 데려 가시므로 세상에 있지 아니하였더라
v.NASB: Enoch walked with God; and he was not, for God took him.
v.NIV: Enoch walked faithfully with God; then he was no more, because God took him away.
v.NRSV: Enoch walked with God; then he was no more, because God took him.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 하나님과 동행하다가 사라졌다. 하나님이 그를 데려가신 것이다.
v.WLB: 에녹은 하나님과 동행하다가 세상에서 사라졌는데 하나님께서 그를 데려가셨기 때문입니다.

v.CNV: 玛土撒拉一百八十七岁的时候，生了拉麦。
v.ESV: When Methuselah had lived 187 years, he fathered Lamech.
v.KJV: And Methuselah lived an hundred eighty and seven years, and begat Lamech:
v.KLB: 므두셀라는 187세에 라멕을 낳았고
v.KRV: 므두셀라는 일백 팔십 칠세에 라멕을 낳았고
v.NASB: Methuselah lived one hundred and eighty-seven years, and became the father of Lamech.
v.NIV: When Methuselah had lived 187 years, he became the father of Lamech.
v.NRSV: When Methuselah had lived one hundred eighty-seven years, he became the father of Lamech.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 백여든일곱 살에 라멕을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 玛土撒拉生拉麦以后，还活了七百八十二年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Methuselah lived after he fathered Lamech 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 라멕을 낳은 후 칠백팔십이 년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 그 후에도 782년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 라멕을 낳은 후 칠백 팔십 이년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Methuselah lived seven hundred and eighty-two years after he became the father of Lamech, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After he became the father of Lamech, Methuselah lived 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Methuselah lived after the birth of Lamech seven hundred eighty-two years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 라멕을 낳은 뒤에, 칠백팔십이 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 라멕을 낳은 후 782년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 玛土撒拉共活了九百六十九岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Methuselah were 969 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died.
v.KLB: 969세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그는 구백 육십 구세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred and sixty-nine years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Methuselah lived a total of 969 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty-nine years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 모두 구백육십구 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 拉麦一百八十二岁的时候，生了一个儿子，
v.ESV: When Lamech had lived 182 years, he fathered a son
v.KJV: And Lamech lived an hundred eighty and two years, and begat a son:
v.KLB: 라멕이 182세에 아들을 낳아
v.KRV: 라멕은 일백 팔십 이세에 아들을 낳고
v.NASB: Lamech lived one hundred and eighty-two years, and became the father of a son.
v.NIV: When Lamech had lived 182 years, he had a son.
v.NRSV: When Lamech had lived one hundred eighty-two years, he became the father of a son;
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 백여든두 살에 아들을 낳았다.

v.CNV: 就给他起名叫挪亚，说：“这儿子必使我们从地上的操作和手中的劳苦得着安慰，因为耶和华曾经咒诅这地。”
v.ESV: and called his name Noah, saying, “Out of the ground that the Lord has cursed, this one shall bring us relief from our work and from the painful toil of our hands.”
v.GAE: 이름을 노아라 하여 이르되 여호와께서 땅을 저주하시므로 수고롭게 일하는 우리를 이 아들이 안위하리라 하였더라
v.KJV: And he called his name Noah, saying, This same shall comfort us concerning our work and toil of our hands, because of the ground which the LORD hath cursed.
v.KLB: 그 이름을 ‘노아’ 라 짓고 “여호와께서 저주한 땅에서 수고하며 고되게 일하는 우리에게 이 아들이 위안을 줄 것이다” 하였다.
v.KRV: 이름을 노아라 하여 가로되 여호와께서 땅을 저주하시므로 수고로이 일하는 우리를 이 아들이 안위하리라 하였더라
v.NASB: Now he called his name Noah, saying, 'This one will give us rest from our work and from the toil of our hands arising from the ground which the LORD has cursed.'
v.NIV: He named him Noah and said, “He will comfort us in the labor and painful toil of our hands caused by the ground the Lord has cursed. ”
v.NRSV: he named him Noah, saying, “Out of the ground that the LORD has cursed this one shall bring us relief from our work and from the toil of our hands.”
v.SAENEW: 그는 아들의 이름을 노아라고 짓고 말하였다. "주님께서 저주하신 땅 때문에, 우리가 수고하고 고통을 겪어야 하는데, 이 아들이 우리를 위로할 것이다."
v.WLB: 그는 아들의 이름을 노아라 부르면서 “여호와께서 저주하신 땅으로 인해 우리가 겪는 일과 우리 손의 수고로움으로부터 이 아들이 우리를 위로할 것이다”라고 말했습니다.

v.CNV: 拉麦生挪亚以后，还活了五百九十五年，并且生了其他的儿女。
v.ESV: Lamech lived after he fathered Noah 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 라멕은 노아를 낳은 후 오백구십오 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.KJV: And Lamech lived after he begat Noah five hundred ninety and five years, and begat sons and daughters:
v.KLB: 라멕은 노아를 낳은 후에도 595년을 더 살며 자녀를 낳고 지내다가
v.KRV: 라멕이 노아를 낳은 후 오백 구십 오년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NASB: Then Lamech lived five hundred and ninety-five years after he became the father of Noah, and he had other sons and daughters.
v.NIV: After Noah was born, Lamech lived 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.NRSV: Lamech lived after the birth of Noah five hundred ninety-five years, and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 노아를 낳은 뒤에, 오백아흔다섯 살을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 노아를 낳은 후 라멕은 595년을 더 살면서 다른 자녀들을 낳았습니다.

v.CNV: 拉麦共活了七百七十七岁，就死了。
v.ESV: Thus all the days of Lamech were 777 years, and he died.
v.KJV: And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years: and he died.
v.KLB: 777세에 죽었다.
v.KRV: 그는 칠백 칠십 칠세를 향수하고 죽었더라
v.NASB: So all the days of Lamech were seven hundred and seventy-seven years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Lamech lived a total of 777 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: Thus all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy-seven years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 모두 칠백칠십칠 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.CNV: 挪亚五百岁的时候，就生了闪、含和雅弗。
v.ESV: After Noah was 500 years old, Noah fathered Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
v.GAE: 노아는 오백 세 된 후에 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았더라
v.KJV: And Noah was five hundred years old: and Noah begat Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
v.KLB: 그리고 노아는 500세가 지난 후에 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았다.
v.KRV: 노아가 오백세 된 후에 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았더라
v.NASB: Noah was five hundred years old, and Noah became the father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
v.NIV: After Noah was 500 years old, he became the father of Shem, Ham and Japheth.
v.NRSV: After Noah was five hundred years old, Noah became the father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 오백 살이 지나서, 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았다.
v.WLB: 노아는 500세가 넘어 셈, 함, 야벳을 낳았습니다.
